name: Salisbury Steak with Mushroom Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground round steak and ground pork with the egg, whole wheat bread crumbs, finely chopped onion, and seasoning.
2. Shape the mixture into patties.
3. Preheat a skillet to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Place the patties in the skillet and brown on each side.
5. Mix the mushroom soup, Kitchen Bouquet (if using), milk or water together.
6. Pour the mixture over the patties.
7. Lower the heat to 250 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Cover and cook for about 20 minutes or until done.
9. Serves 6 to 8.
